feature.label: maddi
feature.description:
maddi analyses Java sources for modification, immutability and independence, and shows the results in the editor: computed annotations as hints, and violations of contracts you have written (@Container, @NotModified, @Immutable, @Independent) as problems with the reasoning that led to them.
Requires a JDK 25 or later to run the analysis on; set it in Preferences > maddi. The analyser itself is bundled and runs out of process, so it does not have to match the JDK Eclipse runs on.
